rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §251.006, which governs campaign finance filing requirements for federal office candidates.
quote: Except as provided by Subsection (b), this title does not apply to a candidate for an office of the federal government.
_note: Rule text concerns election code provisions for federal candidates; no overlap with proposed Tax Code homestead exemption change.
